module.name: no-dynamic-import
module.description: Ban await import() and require() except in test files.

scenarios.name: should allow dynamic import() inside a test file
scenarios.given: a dynamic import() expression in a .test.ts file

scenarios.name: should allow static import declarations in any file

specifications.feature: Banned dynamic imports in source files

scenarios.name: should report await import() in a non-test source file
scenarios.given: an await import('module') expression in a regular .ts file

scenarios.name: should report require() in a non-test source file
scenarios.given: a require('module') call expression in a regular .ts file
